top_signals.title: Policy paper: HM Treasury Market Engagement Group
top_signals.summary: A senior‑level forum for financial market participants to share their views on UK-related developments in financial markets, including gilts and sterling, and broader market themes with the Chancellor of the Exchequer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Notes from the FT Global Bond Summit
top_signals.summary: The reordering is happening in the asset class, too

top_signals.title: Hanoi softens gasoline motorcycle curbs with phased rollout
‘Poor kids join the SDF’ remark reflects deeper debate over Japan’s military
top_signals.summary: The statement by a CDP lawmaker exposed a widening gap between public support for the SDF and the political debates that continue to shape Japan's civil-military relations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bill limiting investors from buying homes set to speed through Congress
top_signals.summary: Top lawmakers reached an agreement on a key housing bill that would limit investor ownership, clearing the way for passage through both chambers of Congress.

top_signals.title: Hacking group claims major attack of Novo Nordisk and attempted $25 million extortion
top_signals.summary: FulcrumSec, a cyber extortion group that emerged in October 2025, has said in a message ‌posted online that it spent more than two months in Novo Nordisk's ​networks stealing data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
